headlines: Drift $280M Solana exploit raises questions over USDC freezes
US Treasury seeks comment on state-level stablecoin rules (NPRM)
Coinbase says CLARITY Act markup is near — stablecoin yield still unresolved
EDX Markets applies for OCC trust bank charter for crypto custody

Bitcoin faces fresh downside as US dollar rallies; traders warn of new lows','Metaplanet buys 5,075 BTC in Q1, becomes 3rd-largest public BTC treasury','Alabama becomes 2nd US state to give DAOs legal status under DUNA','Morgan Stanley advances spot Bitcoin ETF filing (ticker MSBT)

articles.title: Drift $280M Solana exploit raises questions over USDC freezes
articles.summary: Drift Protocol says a 'durable nonce' attack on Solana enabled a roughly $280M drain, much of which was swapped into USDC and bridged — prompting criticism that Circle had hours to freeze funds but did not. Simple: a big Solana DEX hack exposed cross-chain and stablecoin response issues.

articles.title: US Treasury seeks public comment on state-level stablecoin rules (NPRM)
articles.summary: The U.S. Treasury published a notice of proposed rulemaking asking for public input on how states should implement the GENIUS Act’s stablecoin framework for issuers under $10B market cap. Simple: Washington is inviting feedback before finalizing state-level stablecoin rules.

articles.title: Coinbase says CLARITY Act markup is near, but yield dispute remains
articles.summary: Coinbase’s chief legal officer said senators are close to a compromise on the CLARITY crypto market-structure bill, but lawmakers still disagree over whether stablecoin issuers or platforms can pay yield. Simple: federal crypto law may move soon, but the stablecoin-yield fight is the key hold-up.

articles.title: EDX Markets applies for OCC national trust bank to expand custody
articles.summary: EDX Markets filed with the OCC to create a national trust bank (EDX Trust) to separate custody and settlement from trading and offer institutional custody, settlement and fiduciary services under a federal charter. Simple: institutional custody options are expanding under bank supervision.

articles.title: Bitcoin risks fresh lows as US dollar hits multi‑month highs
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell after US‑Iran war headlines and a stronger US dollar; traders warn a DXY breakout could push BTC and other risk assets to new lows. Simple: macro and geopolitical moves are pressuring crypto prices now.

articles.title: Metaplanet buys 5,075 BTC in Q1, becomes 3rd‑largest public BTC treasury
articles.summary: Tokyo-listed Metaplanet bought about 5,075 BTC (~$405M) in Q1 and now holds 40,177 BTC, making it the third-largest publicly listed Bitcoin treasury. Simple: another corporate buyer added a large, visible BTC position this quarter.

articles.title: Alabama gives DAOs legal status under a DUNA law
articles.summary: Alabama signed a DUNA bill that grants decentralized autonomous organizations legal entity status and limited liability, becoming the second US state after Wyoming to do so. Simple: more U.S. states are creating legal frameworks for DAOs.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley advances spot Bitcoin ETF filing (ticker MSBT)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed another S‑1 amendment for a proposed spot Bitcoin ETF (to trade as MSBT on NYSE Arca), detailing custody, seed shares and fees — signaling the product could launch soon if the SEC clears it. Simple: another big bank is lining up a low‑fee spot BTC ETF.
